properties.name: Salty or Mild (Talent)
properties.description: Ultimate CHOP 'N DUNK! improved: For every enemy hit by the final sequence of the ultimate, gains 1 stack of Prep Ingredients for 20s (max stacks: 2). When Prep Ingredients is active, hitting an enemy with combo skills immediately shortens cooldown by 40% and consumes 1 stack of Prep Ingredients.
